title: Right of return not presumed
doc_html:
Art. 1748.  Right of return not presumed

If the donation consists of present property, it is presumed not to have been made subject to the resolutory condition that the donor survive the donee or survive the donee and his descendants.

Acts 2004, No. 619, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 2005.
